description: Glanceable cluster health overview — node status, pod phases, OOMKills, container restarts, node pressure, and ArgoCD sync health
title: Cluster Health Overview

c80e3b31-d5cf-4cdf-9552-cf5e7c377102.name: k8s.cluster.name
c80e3b31-d5cf-4cdf-9552-cf5e7c377102.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'k8s.cluster.name') AS `k8s.cluster.name` FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE `metric_name` = 'k8s.node.cpu.time' GROUP BY `k8s.cluster.name`

widgets.description: Pods stuck in Pending — may indicate scheduling pressure
widgets.title: Pending Pods

widgets.description: ArgoCD apps not in Synced state
widgets.title: Apps Out of Sync

widgets.description: Containers whose last termination was OOM
widgets.title: OOMKilled

widgets.description: Count of pods in each phase over time
widgets.title: Pod Phases

widgets.description: Rate of container restarts by namespace — a rising trend indicates flapping workloads
widgets.title: Container Restart Rate

widgets.description: Containers whose last termination was OOM, by namespace
widgets.title: OOMKill Events

widgets.description: Ready status per node (1 = Ready, 0 = Not Ready)
widgets.title: Node Readiness

widgets.description: Memory, disk, and PID pressure per node (1 = pressure active)
widgets.title: Node Pressure Conditions

widgets.description: Count of apps by sync state over time
widgets.title: ArgoCD Sync Status

widgets.description: Count of apps by health state over time
widgets.title: ArgoCD App Health

widgets.description: Memory requests committed vs allocatable per node — yellow=70%, red=85%. Rising line means the scheduler has less room to place new pods.
widgets.title: Memory Requests % of Allocatable (per node)
